title: 1. Yun2 Bai, Li3 Bai2, Ma3 Jin1 Shui3, and Ma3 Kuai4 Shui3 (HPC):
text:
241
•
Yun2 Bai2: This point is found 2 cun obliquely anterior and distal to Bei1 Mian4• Needle 0.3
to 0.5 cun. {Six Bowels and Lung Auxiliary Branch Reaction Areas} (Bei1 Mian4 is found
in the large depression immediately lateral (distal) to the acromion process of the scapula
when the arm is abducted to 90°.)
• Li3 Bai2: This point is located 2 cun distal and slightly dorsal to Yun2 Bae. Needle 0.3 to
0.5 cun. {Kidney Auxiliary and Lung Branch Reaction Areas}
• Ma3 Jin1 Shui3: This point is found on the face in the depression located along the inferior
border of the zygomatic bone at the medial-to-laterallevel of the lateral canthus. Needle 0.1
to 0.3 cun. {Kidney and Lung Auxiliary Reaction Areas}
• Ma3 Kuai4 Shui3: This point is 0.4 cun immediately inferior to Ma3 Jin1 Shue. Needle 0.1
to 0.3 cun. {Kidney and Bladder Reaction Areas} (Ma3 Jin1 Shue is found on the face in
the depression located along the inferior border of the zygomatic bone at the medial-to-
lateral level of the lateral canthus)
Urethritis (HPC-2)
[Non-specific, Non-gonococcal]
